bids.reasoning: At the opening with no opponent offers or messages yet, I am targeting my maximum utility bid. Since there is no time pressure at t=0.0, I should start firm on my preferred values across all issues and wait for the opponent’s response.

I am targeting a very high utility bid (about 0.96) because it is still the opening phase at t=0.02, so there is little reason to concede on the high-weight issues yet. The opponent’s all-valueA counteroffer gives me very low utility and their message is aggressive cheap talk rather than evidence of real flexibility, so I will make only a small concession on my lowest-weight issues while holding issueC/D/E at my preferred values.

I am targeting a high utility around 0.92 because it is still very early at t=0.04 and the opponent has not conceded at all, repeating the all-valueA bid. Their messages complain about fairness, but the actual offer history shows no movement, so I will make a modest concession on my lowest-weight issues while holding firm on the high-weight issues D and E.

I am targeting a high utility around 0.88–0.90 because it is still very early, and the opponent has only made a minimal concession so far while their messages are mostly pressure tactics. Their offers suggest they prefer lower values, so I am conceding further on my lowest-weight issues first while holding firm on the high-weight issues C, D, and E.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.84, since it is still very early at t=0.08 and the opponent has only made minimal concessions so far. Their offers remain extremely unfavorable to me, but their messages indicate dissatisfaction with my low-issue concessions, so I will concede fully on my two lowest-weight issues while holding firm on the most important issues.

I am targeting a strong early-game utility around 0.80, since time is still only t=0.10 and there is no need to concede heavily yet. The opponent’s bids remain very low for me, with only small movement on issueD/issueE, while their messages are aggressive but not backed by meaningful concessions; I will concede further on the lower/mid-weight issues while holding firm on the most important issueD and issueE.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.76 because it is early in the negotiation, while making a visible concession from my last offer by lowering issueC. The opponent’s actual offers are improving only slowly and remain very low for me, with their latest bid worth about 0.32, so their aggressive messages are treated as pressure rather than reliable constraints.

I am targeting about 0.72 utility, which is a meaningful concession from my earlier bids while still protecting my highest-weight issues D and E this early at t=0.14. The opponent’s offers have improved only slightly for me, from all valueA to a latest utility around 0.32, and their messages are mostly pressure tactics rather than evidence of a real limit. I will continue conceding first on lower-to-mid priority issues while holding the most important issues firm for now.

At t=0.16 we are still early, so I am targeting a strong utility bid around 0.68 while continuing a clear concession path. The opponent’s offers remain very low for me, with only small movement on issueD/issueE, and their messages are mostly pressure tactics; I will concede the lower-weight issueC now while holding firm on the two highest-weight issues, issueD and issueE.

At t=0.18 it is still early enough to target a strong bid, so I am aiming around 0.62 utility while showing movement from my last offer. The opponent’s offers remain low for me overall, but their latest bid signals possible flexibility on issueE, so I will hold issueE at my top value while conceding somewhat on issueD instead of repeating my previous bid.

I am targeting about 0.62 utility for myself, since it is still early at t=0.20 but the opponent has rejected my prior high offers and is only slowly improving offers to me. Their actual bids remain low-utility for me despite aggressive messages, so I will keep major value on the high-weight issues while varying from my previous bid and offering concessions on the low-weight issues.

I am targeting a moderate concession bid around 0.56 utility: below my previous 0.62 offer but still protecting the high-weight issues D and E. At t=0.22 there is still substantial time, and the opponent’s offers show only limited concession toward my preferences despite aggressive messages, so I should not drop to their 0.44-level counter yet.

I am targeting about 0.56 utility, which preserves my most important value on issueE while showing movement on issueD and already conceding heavily on lower-weight issues. At t=0.24 there is still substantial time left, so I should not drop too far; the opponent’s offers remain low for me and their messages are aggressive cheap talk, though their bids suggest they want concessions especially on issueD/issueE.

At t=0.26 there is still time, but the opponent’s offers have slowly improved from all valueA toward occasional concessions on issueD/issueE, while their messages mainly pressure for larger concessions. I am targeting around 0.50 utility by conceding low-weight issues fully and moving issueE down from valueE to valueD, while keeping issueD at valueC rather than accepting their latest low offer.
